name: SysOps Simulator
short_description: SysOps Saga is a simulation game that puts you in the shoes of a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE), managing the intricate web of software, security, and hardware to keep digital systems running. Developed by a FAANG veteran, this game offers an immersive and educational experience for IT enthusiasts.
detailed_description:
SysOps Saga is a thrilling simulation game that puts you in the shoes of a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE), managing the intricate web of software, security, and hardware to keep digital systems running smoothly. Developed by a seasoned FAANG veteran, this game offers an immersive and educational experience for IT enthusiasts.

Key Features



Master the Art of Debugging: Dive into lines of logs, analyse how software operates, identify bugs, and fine-tune your DevOps skills to keep the systems bug-free.

Defend Against Cyber Threats: Face off against relentless hackers and implement security measures to safeguard your digital domain.

Navigate Hardware Upgrades: Manage planned maintenance and hardware updates to ensure optimal system performance.

Career Progression: Develop your career, progressing through different companies with unique challenges and opportunities.

Educational Experience


SysOps Saga is more than just a game; it's a training ground to enhance your IT skills. Gain practical experience in a realistic simulation, designed to prepare you for the dynamic world of Site Reliability Engineering.
